outcome_contract.why: Cleaning staff have no way to signal when a room is done. Reception staff checking guests in are flying blind on whether the room is actually ready. Fixing this means both teams can do their jobs without phone calls or guesswork.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: Cleaning staff can mark individual rooms as cleaned on the prepare dashboard. The checkins screen shows a per-room cleanliness indicator. Reception staff can see at a glance whether a room is ready before a guest reaches the desk.

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `CleaningPriorityTable.tsx` uses `Chip` component with semantic tokens; checkins `BookingRow` has 7 cells
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No "Mark Clean" button; no cleanliness pill in BookingRow
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Button design and placement; pill style; ds-compliant token usage

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Prepare table shows static Clean/Dirty chip; checkins rows have no loading state for sub-data
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Missing: loading state for mark-clean action (optimistic?), already-clean state, error state on failed write
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Optimistic update vs await-then-refresh; dirty‚Üíclean transition animation

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `/roomStatus` writes are Firebase RTDB; auth is Firebase Auth (same for all reception staff); no PII in room status
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No role restriction on who can mark clean (all staff can write); acceptable for hostel context

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `saveRoomStatus` only records error state and rethrows ‚Äî no logging of its own; `console.error` calls are inside `usePrepareDashboard` auto-sync effect, not in the mutation hook itself
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: New manual button path has no error handling today; a failure is swallowed silently
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: New button needs explicit `try/catch` with `showToast("Failed to mark room as clean", "error")` ‚Äî `showToast` utility already exists at `apps/reception/src/utils/toastUtils.ts`

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No test for mark-clean button interaction; no test for cleanliness pill; no test for auto-sync guard
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: New component tests for button + pill; new unit test for guard logic

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `roomStatusSchema` is strict Zod ‚Äî no new fields needed; `saveRoomStatus` mutation exists; `cleaned` is an ISO timestamp string written by `getItalyIsoString()` (not a `YYYY-MM-DD` date)
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Auto-sync guard must use `toEpochMillis(dbStatus.cleaned) >= todayTime` ‚Äî same pattern already in `mergedData` at line ~315 of `usePrepareDashboard.ts`; using `isToday(dbStatus.cleaned)` would silently fail because `isToday` expects `YYYY-MM-DD`
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Guard condition (correct): `clean === "Yes" && toEpochMillis(cleaned) >= todayTime` ‚Üí skip dirty overwrite

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: `useFirebaseSubscription` creates one `onValue` listener per hook instance ‚Äî no React-layer dedup; `/roomStatus` has 10 rooms (small dataset)
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Per-row `useRoomStatusData()` calls would create per-row listeners; must use one subscription at CheckinsTable level and pass `roomStatusMap` as prop
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: Single subscription at CheckinsTable; prop-thread through CheckinsTableView ‚Üí BookingRow

engineering_coverage.current_or_option_state: Reception is a Cloudflare Worker deploy (hot-swap); no DB migration needed; Firebase writes are idempotent
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No rollback concern beyond revert deploy; the auto-sync guard change is backward compatible (clean rooms already get `cleaned` timestamp)
engineering_coverage.carry_forward_or_notes: No feature flag needed; deploy + revert is sufficient rollback

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Covers loading, error, no-data, table render; no interactive test
Covers render, room alloc, row click, notes; no room status test

stage_payload.scope_summary: Cleaning staff need a way to mark individual rooms as finished on the prepare dashboard. Front desk staff checking in guests need to see per-room cleanliness status on the checkins screen. Currently the prepare dashboard is fully read-only and the checkins screen has only a global "Rooms Ready" toggle disconnected from per-room data.
goals: Cleaning staff can tap/click a "Mark Clean" button per room on the prepare dashboard
The mark-clean signal is persisted to Firebase `/roomStatus/index_<room>` and survives page reload
The auto-sync in `usePrepareDashboard` is guarded so a manual clean signal is never overwritten while the room is still occupied (stayover cleans)
The checkins table shows a per-room cleanliness pill next to each booking row (green "Clean" / red "Dirty") derived from the same `/roomStatus` data
The existing global "Rooms Ready" toggle is left unchanged (separate concern)
non_goals: Replacing or removing the global "Rooms Ready" toggle on the checkins screen
Adding a "mark as dirty" button (auto-sync already handles this when occupants are detected)
Per-occupant or per-bed cleaning status (room-level is sufficient)
constraints: Firebase `/roomStatus` schema must remain backward compatible (`SingleRoomStatus` strict Zod schema)
No new Firebase paths needed ‚Äî `/roomStatus/index_<room>` is the existing write target
UI must follow reception design system tokens (Tailwind v4, semantic tokens)
assumptions: `roomAllocated` in `CheckInRow` holds the raw room number (e.g. "3") ‚Äî the Firebase key is `index_3`

`useFirebaseSubscription` does NOT deduplicate across React hook instances; each call installs its own `onValue` listener ‚Äî this is why `roomStatusMap` must be subscribed once at `CheckinsTable` level and passed as a prop, not called per-row

rehearsal_issues.Issues Found: None ‚Äî subscription must live at CheckinsTable level (not per-row); prop-threading required through CheckinsTableView ‚Üí BookingRow (2 prop additions)
[Minor] `usePrepareDashboard.test.ts` has no guard assertions ‚Äî confirmed known gap to fill

None ‚Äî `usePrepareDashboardData()` already subscribes to `/roomStatus` internally; expose `roomStatusMap` in its return value (no second listener needed); `PrepareDashboard` calls `useRoomStatusMutations()` directly for `saveRoomStatus` (write-only, no subscription overhead)

process_topology.trigger: Cleaning staff finish cleaning a room
process_topology.end_condition: Reception staff can confirm room is ready when checking a guest in

areas.label: Cleaning staff workflow
areas.flow: Staff clean room ‚Üí have no system action available ‚Üí room status unchanged in system
areas.issues: No write path for cleaning staff

areas.label: Prepare dashboard auto-sync
areas.flow: `usePrepareDashboard` `useEffect` runs on every render when date=today ‚Üí writes `clean: false` if occupants active, `clean: "Yes"` if no occupants ‚Üí overwrites any prior value
areas.issues: Overwrites manual clean signal for occupied rooms (stayover bug)

areas.label: Checkins room readiness
areas.flow: Reception views checkins table ‚Üí no per-room status shown ‚Üí clicks global "Rooms Ready" toggle manually based on offline knowledge
areas.issues: Global toggle disconnected from per-room data; no individual room signal
